name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly changes the data preprocessing logic (retaining raw strings for LCA), the LCA indicators (QEA_2/QEB_2 instead of job security indices), the modeling approach (multinomial logistic regression instead of binary), and adds new sensitivity analyses (sector complexity). Because the core data structure and modeling strategy have shifted, the previous outputs are not compatible with the new requirements. Therefore, the process must restart from the beginning.
